tasks.subject: Task 1: sqlc queries for recorded nights + attendees
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add two set-based queries and regenerate the sqlc layer so the handler has typed ListRecordedNights / ListNightsAttendees methods.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql`
- Regenerate: `backend/internal/db/*` via `just sqlc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ListRecordedNights: LEFT JOIN movies, picker_id NOT NULL, newest-first
- ListNightsAttendees: pick_id + attendees for ANY(night_ids)
- just sqlc + go build pass
- joined movie cols generated nullable (pgtype.Int4/pgtype.Text)

**Verify:** `cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql", "backend/internal/db"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ListRecordedNights: LEFT JOIN movies, picker_id NOT NULL, newest-first", "ListNightsAttendees: pick_id + attendees for ANY(night_ids)", "just sqlc + go build pass", "joined movie cols generated nullable"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: List handler, pure helpers, route + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add listNightsHandler and its three pure helpers, register the route, and unit-test the assembly logic.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/nights.go`, `backend/main.go`
- Test: `backend/nights_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- nightStore gains ListRecordedNights + ListNightsAttendees
- movieDTOFromCols/groupAttendees/toNightResponses pure + unit-tested
- handler issues exactly two store calls; skips attendees when no nights
- route GET /groups/{groupId}/nights registered
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd backend && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/main.go", "backend/nights_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nightStore gains both methods", "3 pure helpers unit-tested", "handler issues 2 store calls, skips attendees when empty", "route registered", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Integration test (testcontainers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the endpoint returns recorded nights newest-first, excludes the open night, and carries movie + attendees, against real Postgres.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/nights_integration_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- TestNightsListIntegration seeds 2 recorded + 1 open night, GETs the endpoint
- asserts 200, newest-first order, open excluded, movie+attendees, empty group → []
- just test-integration passes

**Verify:** `cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightsListIntegration$' ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightsListIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seeds 2 recorded + 1 open night", "asserts newest-first, open excluded, movie+attendees", "empty group → []", "just test-integration passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Mobile listNights client + parser + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the typed listNights client and parseNights validator with tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/nights.ts`
- Test: `mobile/lib/nights.test.ts`, `mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parseNights array-guards + maps parseNight
- listNights GETs /groups/{groupId}/nights
- unit tests: array/[]/non-array/bad element
- integration case parses array over real local server
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseNights array-guards + maps parseNight", "listNights GETs nights endpoint", "unit tests: array/[]/non-array/bad element", "integration case parses array", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire the History screen to listNights
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the History tab's TODO(#39) stub with a real fetch, adding loading and error states.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/app/(tabs)/history.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- useEffect fetch via listNights with AbortController; nights/loading/error state
- loading → ActivityIndicator; error → danger text; empty → existing state; loaded → existing list
- TODO(#39) removed; lib/history.ts unchanged
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`; manual History tab check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/history.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useEffect fetch via listNights with AbortController", "loading/error/empty/loaded states", "TODO(#39) removed; lib/history.ts unchanged", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
